top_signals.title: Ukraine is launching strike-drones from everything – including Black Sea robo-boats
top_signals.summary: The Pentagon is studying the lesson as it shifts focus toward a possible conflict with China.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK flood reinsurer pushes to cap claims and lift premiums
top_signals.summary: Move follows Flood Re being saddled with expensive properties that have made scheme ‘regressive’
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Gold losses ease after worst quarter in 13 years as interest rate fears hit bullion
top_signals.summary: Gold fell further on Wednesday, with bullion continuing its slide after suffering its worst quarter since 2013.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Google ordered to pay Klarna $1.5bn antitrust damages
top_signals.summary: Swedish court rules search engine favoured its own price-comparison tool over fintech’s PriceRunner site
